summary: A short clip from a WAVY 10 News segment. It opens with a blue NEW AT 5 title card, then shows a graphic with a booking-style photograph and a name beside it, headed IMMIGRATION/DRUG ARREST with a NEWPORT NEWS label.

script.scene: A blue NEW AT 5 title card.
A graphic shows a booking-style photo and a name; headed IMMIGRATION/DRUG ARREST, NEWPORT NEWS.
The arrest graphic continues on screen.

notable_text: NEW AT 5; IMMIGRATION/DRUG ARREST; NEWPORT NEWS; WAVY 10
